reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, no se puede decender del auto, la atención la realizan los empleados en forma rápida y segura. Ser socio del ACA suma puntos en tu compra y hay descuento los fines de semana.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, you cannot get out of the car, the attention is provided by the employees quickly and safely. Being an ACA member adds points to your purchase and there is a discount on weekends.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpMWVMVDZ3RRAB
